description: The image captures a cozy living room bathed in soft sunlight filtering through a window on the left wall. The light casts a warm glow, illuminating the white walls and wooden floor. A gray couch sits invitingly against one wall, adorned with a pink blanket casually draped over its backrest. In front of the couch, a black coffee table takes center stage, hosting a blue mug and a red cup, perhaps remnants of a morning or evening routine. To the right of the room, a white door stands closed, leading to unseen spaces beyond. The room exudes a sense of comfort and tranquility, a personal sanctuary where one can relax and unwind.
